chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3571 - وَ رَوَى عُمَرُ بْنُ أُذَيْنَةَ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : "إِنَّ اَللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى لَيُحِبُّ اَلاِغْتِرَابَ فِي طَلَبِ اَلرِّزْقِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3571 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Indeed, Allah (swt), Blessed and Exalted, loves traveling in pursuit of sustenance."
